titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Real Estate Office, Yale University, Records
Real Estate Office, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig and staff of Manuscripts and Archives

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday January 23, 2020 at 10:18
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.unittitle: Real Estate Office, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, subject files, memoranda, and photographs documenting the operations and activities of the Yale Real Estate Office. Materials include legal documents and correspondence concerning real estate investments, real estate accounts and records, New Haven property files, statements, bills and receipts.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of Finance and Administration

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 5-D (YRG 5-D), Investment and insurance records of Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Real Estate Office, Yale University, Records (RU 522). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, subject files, memoranda, and photographs documenting the operations and activities of the Yale Real Estate Office. Materials include legal documents and correspondence concerning real estate investments, real estate accounts and records, New Haven property files, statements, bills and receipts.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of Finance and Administration

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Photographs are arranged alphabetically by name of building (if available) or by address.

did.unittitle: Becton basement and metal shop renovation photos and assignment plans
Culinary Institute of America, 339-393 Prospect Street

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Prospect, Cedar, High, Congress, State, Bradley, Park, Whitney, Edwards, Howe, Mansfield, and Lake Place buildings.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Grant, W.T., Company: 96 Orange St., 102-106 Orange St., 15-21 Center St.
Mellon Gallery: Chapel-High (Kusterer) 44 High and 1082-1090 Chapel
Mellon Gallery-Perlroth Properties (Lomas and Nettleton) 46 High and 1074-1080 Chapel
Yale Center for British Art: Mellon Gallery
Case files of the Yale University Mortgage Program
